title: GM’s electric future depends on a new battery — and this building
summary: GM is accelerating deployment of new battery technology to reduce EV prices earlier than planned, with a specific manufacturing facility playing a critical role in this strategy.
content: GM wants to slash EV prices by deploying new battery tech up to a year earlier than planned. This building is key to making that happen.

zh.title: 通用汽车的电动未来取决于新电池——以及这座建筑

title: As VC-backed e-bike startups went bankrupt, bootstrapped Lectric grew
summary: While venture-backed e-bike companies have collapsed, bootstrapped Lectric is thriving by launching three new brands in six months and capitalizing on U.S. market demand for competition.
content: Lectric, which says the U.S. market is ripe for competition and choice, has launched three new brands in the past six months.

zh.title: 当风投支持的电单车初创公司破产时，自筹资金的Lectric却在增长
zh.summary: 虽然风险投资支持的电单车公司已经倒闭，但自筹资金的Lectric通过在六个月内推出三个新品牌并利用美国市场对竞争的需求而蓬勃发展。

title: The most interesting startups right now want to get you off your phone
summary: In contrast to the AI funding boom, founders are building products to reduce phone dependency—from in-person social gaming platforms to DIY computing devices—signaling a shift away from digital-first trends.
content: While the AI fundraising machine keeps breaking its own records, some founders are building in the other direction.  Mirror founder Brynn Putnam just raised money for Board, a startup focused on bringing people together through in-person games and social experiences. Cyberdeck creators are going viral crafting whimsical DIY computers that literally encourage users to touch grass. Unlike the AI-free browser crowd, this doesn’t just feel like backlash, […]

zh.title: 现在最有趣的初创公司想让你远离手机
zh.summary: 与人工智能融资热潮形成对比，创始人正在构建产品以减少手机依赖——从面对面社交游戏平台到DIY计算设备——这表明偏离数字优先趋势的转变。

title: Review: Spider-Noir recaptures the magic of a bygone era
summary: Nicolas Cage delivers a standout performance as 1930s private investigator Ben Reilly in Spider-Noir, blending classic noir atmosphere with his distinctive comedic style.
content: Nicolas Cage was born to play 1930s PI Ben Reilly/The Spider: part Bogart, part Bugs Bunny, 100% Cage-y.

zh.title: 评论：《蜘蛛侠：黑色侠探》重现往日魅力
zh.summary: 尼古拉斯·凯奇在《蜘蛛侠：黑色侠探》中饰演1930年代私家侦探本·瑞利，表现出众，融合了经典黑色电影氛围与他独特的喜剧风格。

title: The Sonos Era 100 speaker is down to its lowest price in months
summary: The Sonos Era 100 smart speaker has dropped to $189 (from $219) at major retailers, with refurbished units available for $134, making it an affordable entry point for multi-room audio.
content:
Whether you’re considering starting a Sonos speaker setup, or adding to an existing group, the Sonos Era 100 is worth picking up. The compact, capable smart speaker is currently marked down to $189 ($30 off) at a variety of retailers, including Amazon, Best Buy, and directly from Sonos. If you want an even lower price, Sonos is selling refurbished Era 100 speakers for just $134. They come with fresh accessories and packaging, and sport the same one-year warranty as its new speakers.
Sonos Era 100
The Era 100 is Sonos’s most affordable in-home smart speaker. Offering pleasant sound at a relatively compact size, it improves upon the prior Sonos One with stereo audio, line-in support, and Bluetooth support. Read our review.

Where to Buy:

 $219 $189 at Amazon
 $219 $189 at Sonos
 $219 $189 at Best Buy

The wireless speaker has a rich, detailed sound profile, with room-filling audio despite its small size. You might be able to improve the sound further with the Sonos Trueplay feature, which uses either your phone or the speaker’s built-in microphone to automatically tune it to your space. The Era 100 can easily connect with other speakers in the Sonos ecosystem for multi-room play, even with different Sonos models.
The Era 100 has expanded functionality from previous entry-level Sonos speakers, adding in Bluetooth and USB-C wired audio, as well as improved onboard controls. While the speaker features built-in voice assistant support for both Sonos and Alexa, you can flip a switch on its back to cut power to the microphone.
Read our full Sonos Era 100 review.
Other deals to consider
The Google Nest Doorbell is one of our favorite video doorbells, and the wired version is currently marked down at Amazon to just $140 ($40 off). This doorbell has fairly sharp 960 x 1280 video quality, notifications for people and packages (a Google Home Premium subscription can provide more detailed notifications, including familiar face recognition), and full integration with many other G

zh.title: Sonos Era 100扬声器创数月新低价
zh.summary: Sonos Era 100智能扬声器在主要零售商处降至$189（原价$219），翻新机型售价$134，为多房间音频系统提供了经济实惠的入门选择。

title: This is your laptop… on AI
summary: Major tech companies at developer conferences are unveiling AI-integrated laptops and tools, with executives touting AI as transformative, but actual consumer demand for these products remains unclear.
content:
We're now deep into developer conference season, and one of the themes so far is the relentless conviction from Big Tech companies that AI is going to change everything about how we do everything. Nvidia's Jensen Huang made that clearer than anyone this week, when he described a completely new way of using our laptops - and a completely new kind of laptop made to support it. It's all very interesting, but it raises the same question we have around so many AI products: Does anyone actually want this?
On this episode of The Vergecast, Nilay and David run through a lot of the products coming out of Microsoft Build and Google I/O, from Gemini S …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 这就是你的笔记本电脑...搭载AI技术
zh.summary: 主要科技公司在开发者大会上推出AI集成笔记本电脑和工具，高管们吹捧AI具有变革性，但这些产品的实际消费者需求仍不明朗。

title: Supabase doubles valuation to $10B in 8 months
summary: Supabase, an open-source database company, has doubled its valuation to $10 billion in eight months, benefiting significantly from AI developer tools like Claude and Codex.
content: Supabase, an example of an open source project becoming a fast-growing company, has greatly benefited from AI tools like Claude, Codex, and other vibe-coding platforms.

zh.title: Supabase 在8个月内将估值翻倍至100亿美元
zh.summary: 开源数据库公司 Supabase 在八个月内将估值翻倍至 100 亿美元，从 Claude 和 Codex 等 AI 开发者工具中获益匪浅。

title: What happens when your phone is confiscated at the airport
summary: U.S. customs agents at American airports frequently confiscate phones from travelers, including citizens, with limited legal recourse—a practice illustrated by a Minnesota organizer whose device remains unreturned.
content:
Even if you've done nothing wrong, it's never a good idea to hand your phone to the cops. But international travelers at American airports often have no choice - even if they're US citizens. 
When Minnesota labor organizer Janette Zahia Corcelius returned home from a three-week trip to Europe in late April, she was detained and questioned by customs agents at Minneapolis-St. Paul International Airport. Before they let her go, the agents searched her luggage twice, confiscated political literature she had purchased abroad, and seized her phone - which has yet to be returned, according to a complaint filed in federal court in Minnesota.
Is i …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 你的手机在机场被没收时会发生什么
zh.summary: 美国海关人员在美国机场经常从旅客（包括公民）那里没收手机，但法律救济选择有限——一位明尼苏达州组织者的设备仍未被归还就是这种做法的例证。

title: Google and FBI warn of ransomware group that sends fake IT workers to hack victims in person
summary: The Silent Ransom Group deploys impostors posing as IT support staff to law firms, where they steal data using USB drives or install remote access tools for extortion.
content: Cybercriminals, part of a gang known as Silent Ransom Group, have sent people pretending to be IT support employees to law firms' offices, where the criminals have stolen data using USB drives or remote access tools.

zh.title: 谷歌和 FBI 警告勒索软件组织派遣假冒 IT 人员亲自入侵受害者
zh.summary: 沉默勒索集团向律师事务所派遣冒充 IT 支持人员的人员，他们使用 USB 驱动器窃取数据或安装远程访问工具进行勒索。

title: Trump admin tries again to revive dying coal industry
summary: The Trump administration is using federal funding to keep existing coal plants operational and construct the first new coal plants in over a decade.
content: Money would keep coal plants open, build the first new plants in over a decade.

title: The Fitbit Air is a good wearable weighed down by a chatty AI "coach"
summary: Google's new Fitbit Air excels as a minimalist, reliable fitness tracker, but its verbose AI Health Coach feature feels unnecessary and detracts from the user experience.
content: The Air succeeds as a minimalist, reliable fitness tracker, but Google's AI Health Coach feels unnecessary.

zh.title: Fitbit Air是一款优秀的可穿戴设备，但被啰嗦的AI"教练"所拖累
zh.summary: 谷歌新推出的Fitbit Air作为一款极简主义的可靠健身追踪器表现出色，但其冗长的AI健康教练功能显得不必要，并损害了用户体验。

title: New York lawmakers pass one-year ban on new data centers
summary: New York State legislature passed a one-year moratorium on large data centers (20+ megawatts) to allow policymakers time to assess their environmental impact and energy costs.
content:
The New York State legislature passed a one-year moratorium on new large data centers, the first statewide ban of its kind if Democratic Governor Kathy Hochul signs it into law.
Lawmakers behind the bill say it's meant to give policymakers time to understand the impact of large data centers on the environment and energy prices. It directs the state's environmental agency to create an impact report assessing the amount of electricity, water, and land that data centers use, and the pollution they create. It also requires companies planning to build large data centers - defined as having a peak demand of at least 20 megawatts - to hold and fun …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 纽约议员通过新数据中心一年禁令
zh.summary: 纽约州立法机构通过了对大型数据中心（20+兆瓦）的一年禁令，以便给政策制定者时间评估其环保影响和能源成本。

title: The token bill comes due: Inside the industry scramble to manage AI’s runaway costs
summary: AI companies are shifting from rapid scaling toward cost control and guardrails as infrastructure expenses become unsustainable, ending the "move fast" era of development.
content: "The whole conversation shifted from tokenmaxxing and 'go fast' to 'we need guardrails, how do we control this?'"

zh.summary: 随着基础设施支出变得难以承受，AI公司正在从快速扩张转向成本控制和防护措施，终结了开发的"快速行动"时代。

title: Not the next R8? Audi reveals mid-engined plug-in hybrid V8 Nuvolari.

content: The space agency said Roscosmos discovered new leaks in the Russian service module.

title: AirTrunk commits $30B to build 5GW of AI data centers in India
summary: Australian data center operator AirTrunk is committing $30 billion to build 5 gigawatts of AI data center capacity in India, positioning the country as a major hub for artificial intelligence infrastructure. This expansion reflects growing demand for AI computing resources globally and India's emergence as a strategic location for data center investment.
content: The Australian data center operator plans to set up 5GW of capacity in India.

zh.title: AirTrunk承诺投资300亿美元在印度建设5GW AI数据中心
zh.summary: 澳大利亚数据中心运营商AirTrunk承诺投资300亿美元在印度建设5吉瓦的AI数据中心容量，将该国定位为人工智能基础设施的主要枢纽。这一扩张反映了全球对AI计算资源不断增长的需求，以及印度作为数据中心投资战略地点的崛起。

title: This chunky little tablet got my kid to clean up his toys
summary: The Skylight Buddy is a $139.99 tablet designed for children ages 4-10 that helps track routines and chores, with optional $39/year premium features. Despite limited free functionality, the device's simple interface and appealing design effectively motivates young children to complete household tasks.
content:
Just a cute little guy.	

Never underestimate the power that a cheap tablet holds over a kid under six.
The Skylight Buddy is a device with one job: to be a cute little guy that helps your kid track routines and chores. It's $139.99, plus an optional subscription. And to my surprise, even though it offers a pretty limited set of features without the $39-per-year "Plus" features, it actually worked.
Skylight recommends the Buddy for kids aged four up to 10. An adult has to set it up, naturally, which you do inside of the Skylight app. From there, you make a profile for your kid and assign it to the Buddy, which is strictly one-kid-per-device. That might be a non-sta …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 这款厚实的小平板电脑让我的孩子整理了玩具
zh.summary: Skylight Buddy是一款售价139.99美元的平板电脑，专为4-10岁儿童设计，可帮助跟踪日常活动和家务，提供可选的每年39美元的高级功能。尽管免费功能有限，但该设备的简洁界面和吸引人的设计能有效地激励年幼的儿童完成家务任务。

title: I customized a MacBook Neo with colorful spare parts
summary: Apple's new MacBook Neo combines affordability, color options, and exceptional repairability, allowing owners to easily swap official spare parts in different colors. The design enables creative customization, as demonstrated by a reviewer who mixed indigo, citrus, and blush components.
content:
Indigo, citrus, and a touch of blush. It’s a Neo cocktail. | Photo: Antonio G. Di Benedetto / The Verge	

The MacBook Neo is Apple's cheapest laptop, its most colorful, and its easiest to repair in years. That means owners can buy replacement parts in all four of its available colors and swap them in on their own. So that got us thinking: What if we bought a Neo just to see how funky we could make it look with official parts?
I ordered an indigo Neo to tinker with, and some spare parts from Apple's self-service site.


  
 
  
 


 

 View this post on Instagram

 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 



I opted for a replacement trackpad and bottom case in blush, and USB-C ports and keycaps in citrus. My goal was to make it as mishmash-y as possible without changing out more labo …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我用彩色配件定制了MacBook Neo
zh.summary: 苹果新款MacBook Neo结合了价格实惠、颜色选择和卓越的可维修性，允许用户轻松更换不同颜色的官方配件。这种设计能够实现创意定制，正如一位评测者混合靛蓝、柑橘和腮红色组件所演示的那样。

title: Porsche’s Cayenne Coupe Turbo will even make 911 owners nervous
summary: Porsche's SUV lineup—Cayenne and Macan—now represents 62% of company sales and is expanding into electric vehicles, with the Cayenne Coupe Turbo offering performance comparable to traditional 911 sports cars. The shift underscores Porsche's strategic evolution beyond sports cars despite objections from traditionalist enthusiasts.
content:
Back in 2002, Porsche fans sputtered with rage as the Cayenne made its debut at the Paris Motor. More than 20 years later, Porsche now sells more SUVs than anything else in its lineup. Last year, the Macan and Cayenne accounted for 62 percent of all Porsche sales. Now, these SUVs are trolling traditionalists in a whole new way: They've gone electric, with a Cayenne Electric joining a smaller plug-in Macan. And the Cayenne Coupe Turbo is fast enough to have 911 owners looking over their shoulders. 
Even Porsche's hardcore fans, the kind who attend Lollapalooza-type festivals to worship a bygone age of air-cooled engines, have to give the Tur …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 保时捷Cayenne Coupe Turbo将令911车主感到紧张
zh.summary: 保时捷的SUV产品线——Cayenne和Macan——现已占公司销售额的62%，并正在扩展至电动车领域。Cayenne Coupe Turbo提供与传统911跑车相媲美的性能。这一转变表明保时捷正在超越跑车业务的战略演变，尽管遭到传统主义爱好者的反对。

title: Mira Murati steps back into the spotlight, carefully
summary: Mira Murati is re-engaging publicly after maintaining a lower profile, recognizing that visibility is crucial for market relevance. The shift signals a strategic change in her approach to maintaining presence in a competitive industry.
content: In the current environment, remaining heads down has diminishing returns; at some point, you have to make some noise just to remind the market you exist.

title: Founders Fund launches game show starring Sam Altman, Palmer Luckey, and other tech elites
summary: Founders Fund launched a game show featuring prominent tech entrepreneurs including Sam Altman and Palmer Luckey, moderated by the firm's chief marketing officer. The debut episode brought together current technology industry leaders for conversation.
content: The debut episode, moderated by Founders Fund chief marketing officer Mike Solana, included a star-studded cast of current tech luminaries.
